SMART GOAL.value: I will improve my skills with drawing anatomy and develop my own art style by practicing 3 times a week and by the end of next year I will have improved.

CPC What skill did you cover.value: Personal Branding | Spent majority of time getting to know one another and what we should cover in upcoming sessions. | Personal Branding | Personal Branding P1 | Vision Boards

CPC What component skill did you cover.value: How to build your personal brand | Lightly touched on upcoming skill: Personal Branding. | Flexibility/Adaptability in tough moments | CEO of You Inc. | Goal Setting

CPC Discussion topics.value:
Spent time in the beginning introducing ourselves and our backgrounds and hobbies. 

Today we talked about authenticity and the choices we make everyday that contribute toward building a personal brand that others will be able to vouch for when you are not there. 

"All of us need to understand the importance of branding. We are CEOs of our
own companies: Me Inc. To be in business today, our most important job is to
be head marketer for the brand called You."

"Personal branding is about managing your name — even if you don’t own a
business — in a world of misinformation, disinformation, and semi-permanent
Google records. Going on a date? Chances are that your “blind” date has
Googled your name. Going to a job interview? Ditto."

How to build on your personal brand: 
1. Vision & purpose
2. Values
3. Passions
4. Top goals in the next year, 2 years, 5 years
5. Top brand attributes
6. Core strengths & motivated skills
7. Competitive Edge | We talked about their interests and how they are thinking and planning for the future. | Resilience through some of the tough moments of change they have gone through. | talked about backgrounds, family and interests | Discussed how to start mapping SMART goals

CPC Why.value: Great introductory session yet unfortunately was unable to connect with Calibelisa. | Still working on connectivity issues and having them feel they can open up. | Great getting to know them and plan out upcoming sessions
